selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026
2200
Total Hours
7
Epics
GRC
Requester
Netcompany

Why It's Important
01
Tech Debt Reduction
Restructures revenue-management-be-custom to hexagonal architecture, improving maintainability and reducing long-term technical debt across teams.
02
Critical Upgrades
Implements crucial technology upgrades including Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai to keep the platform secure and performant.
03
Configuration Management
Introduces Config Items Management tool for safe packaging and migrating configurations across environments without risk.
Key Epics & Features
Hexagonal Architecture Refactor
Restructure revenue-management-be-custom to clean hexagonal architecture with improved separation of concerns, enhanced testability, and reduced coupling across domain boundaries.
Java 25 Upgrade
Migrate codebase to Java 25 to leverage latest language features, virtual threads, pattern matching, and significant performance improvements for tax operations.
Spring Boot 4.x.x Migration
Upgrade Spring Boot framework to latest version with enhanced observability, improved dependency management, native compilation support, and critical security patches.
Oracle 26ai Database
Migrate to Oracle 26ai to harness AI-powered optimization, advanced analytics, and improved query performance for high-volume tax transaction processing.
Tech Debt Across Teams
Systematic UI improvements and technical debt reduction initiatives spanning ATH, EOS, SPA, HEL, and DAID teams for long-term platform sustainability.
Config Items Management
Build dedicated tool for safely packaging, versioning, and migrating configurations across development, staging, and production environments without manual intervention.
Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026

agenticCustomInput:
Generate a slide for each unique  "roadmap initiative" found under the "initiative group" called "NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENT COVERAGE" 

Dont halucinate numbers. If you cannot find or calculate them, Write [NO DATA].

I expect the following instances:
ACCESSIBILITY
MAINTAINABILITY
OPERABILITY
PERFORMANCE EFFICIENCY
RELIABILITY
SECURITY
TEST SUITE OPTIMIZATION
TRACEABILITY
USABILITY

Return valid JSON
agenticJsonResponse:
{"slides":{"slide_1":{"instances":[{"auto_div_header":"
PI 30
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Accessibility
Non-Functional Requirement Coverage · Solon Tax 2026
1062.7
Total Hours
8
Epics
Other
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
WCAG 2.1 AA Compliance
Ensures compliance with accessibility standards WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549, making the platform accessible to users with disabilities and meeting regulatory requirements.
02
Inclusive User Experience
Implements accessibility improvements across multiple modules (DAID, SPA, ATH) to provide an inclusive experience for all users regardless of ability.
03
Legal & Ethical Compliance
Demonstrates commitment to accessibility standards and legal compliance, reducing risk and expanding the user base to include individuals with accessibility needs.
Key Epics & Features
Compliance with accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549)
Build comprehensive accessibility compliance covering analysis, design, build, testing, and finalization to meet WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549 standards across the platform.
Accessibility Improvements (Current PI27)
Systematic accessibility enhancements including build, testing, and finalization activities to improve overall platform accessibility and user experience.

Security

4924.3
Total Hours
12
Epics
GRC, Other
Requesters
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Data Protection & Compliance
Implements GDPR-compliant data access restrictions and personal data encryption to ensure regulatory compliance and protect sensitive customer information across all classification levels.
02
Row-Level Security
Establishes hierarchical row-level access controls based on user teams and operational report types, ensuring data visibility is restricted to appropriate authorization levels.
03
API & Infrastructure Hardening
Hardens API request handling with expression pattern validation and implements Keycloak active cluster mode for robust authentication and authorization infrastructure.
Key Epics & Features
Data Security - Restrict Access to Personal Data GDPR - Part 1/4
Build admin-based access restrictions for personal data with role-based controls and data classification enforcement to ensure GDPR compliance and protect sensitive information.
Data Security - Define Access per User Group - Part 2/4
Define granular access permissions per user access group across different data classification levels, enabling flexible and scalable access control policies.
Data Security - Restrict Access GDPR - Part 3/4
Extend GDPR-compliant access restrictions with additional enforcement mechanisms and audit capabilities for comprehensive personal data protection.
Data Security - Encrypt/Decrypt - Part 4/4
Implement encryption and decryption mechanisms for sensitive personal data to provide end-to-end protection and meet advanced data security requirements.
Row-Level Security - Operational Report Types
Support row-level security with allowed operations per operational report type, restricting data visibility based on report classification and user permissions.
Row-Level Access per Hierarchical User Levels
Implement data visibility permissions and row-level access controls based on hierarchical levels of users within teams, ensuring proper data segregation across organizational structures.
Row-Level Security Reference Implementation
Provide reference implementation for row-level security in human tasks, demonstrating best practices and enabling teams to apply security patterns consistently.
Keycloak Active Cluster Mode
Migrate to Keycloak active cluster mode for high-availability authentication and authorization, ensuring resilient identity management across distributed infrastructure.
SS Enhancements - Authorization Support
Enhance Security Service with comprehensive authorization support, enabling fine-grained access control and policy enforcement across all platform components.
SS Enhancements - Public Item Configuration Part 1/2
Configure items that can be publicly available at database level, providing flexible control over public data exposure while maintaining security boundaries.
SS Enhancements - Public Item Configuration Part 2/2
Complete public item configuration with additional database-level controls and validation mechanisms for comprehensive public data management.
PenTest - Harden API Requests
Harden API requests with expression pattern validation to prevent injection attacks and enforce strict input validation across all API endpoints.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · ConfidentialExecutive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"},{"auto_div_header":"
